description_long: This house is a large, multi-structure residential property set within a landscaped lot featuring numerous trees and green spaces. The main building has a complex, multi-gabled roof with several intersecting sections, suggesting a sprawling floor plan. The property includes a prominent driveway and a paved area leading up to the main entrance, which is accentuated by a covered porch and flanked by decorative columns. The exterior walls are primarily a neutral tone, with dark roofing materials and contrasting trim. Windows are arranged in a mix of symmetrical and asymmetrical patterns, with some larger panes and smaller, regularly spaced units. The lot is bordered by hedges and fencing, providing privacy and a sense of enclosure.
description: A large, multi-gabled house with landscaped grounds, a prominent driveway, and a covered entryway with columns. The property features numerous trees, hedges, and a mix of window sizes and arrangements.
description_view_0: Front view showing the main entrance, driveway, and landscaped front yard with trees and hedges.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the length of the property, the driveway, and the arrangement of trees and hedges along the side.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the back of the house, additional green space, and the continuation of the fencing and hedges.
description_view_3: Opposite side view showing the complex roof structure, side yard, and more trees and open space.
attribute_window_arrangement: asymmetrical placement with a mix of large and small windows
attribute_entryway_design: Covered porch with columns, steps leading to a main door, and decorative trim
